title: Check the statuses of words
content:
Use this endpoint to check if a list of words are blocked. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/blockedword/check/| /v1.3/blockedword/check/| |Request parameter data type|`advertiser_id`: number |`advertiser_id`: string | |Response parameter name|`blocked_word`
`existed`|`word`
`blocked`| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/blockedword/check/ **Method** GET **Header** ```xtable |Field|Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Type|Description| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {required}|string| Advertiser ID. | |blocked_words {required}|string[]| List of words that you want to check. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --get -H "Access-Token:xxx" \ --data-urlencode "advertiser_id=ADVERTISER_ID" \ --data-urlencode "blocked_words=[\"BLOCKED_WORDS\"]" \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/blockedword/check/ (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Type|Description| |---|---|---| |message|string|The return message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |code |number|The return code. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |data |object|Returned data.| #|results |object[]| Results. | ##|word|string| Word being checked.| ##|blocked|boolean| Enum values: `True` (word is blocked), `False` (word is not blocked).| |request_id |string|Unique ID of the request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code); ```
